title.en: VOID-3: Eternal Abyss of the Stars

description.ko: 고대 블랙홀 주위로 빛이 휘어지고 고요한 성운이 창조의 비밀을 속삭이는 VOID-3 우주의 가장 먼 곳으로 떠나는 여정입니다.
description.en: A journey into the furthest reaches of the VOID-3 universe, where light bends around ancient black holes and silent nebulae whisper the secrets of creation.

prompt: Cinematic 8k hyper-realistic visualization of VOID-3, cosmic deep space theme, swirling dark matter, glowing event horizon of a supermassive black hole, vibrant distant nebulae in deep violet and cyan, floating crystalline structures, ethereal atmosphere, volumetric lighting, unreal engine 5 render style.
